rk4Step_formula.detail: Standard RK4: k1..k4 computed per ADR spec, stateOut = state + (dt/6)*(k1+2k2+2k3+k4)

integrate_returns_Nx13.detail: Allocates zeros(N,13), sets row 1, loops rk4Step, returns Nx13 matrix

constructor_params_struct.detail: Reads geometry.wheelRadius, geometry.trackWidth, dynamics.mass, dynamics.inertia, dynamics.maxTorque

move_aerial_noop.detail: Unmatched cases (UP, DOWN, ROLL, PITCH) fall through to 'otherwise' — no-op

buildGeometry_output.detail: Returns 24×3 verts (body 8 + left wheel 8 + right wheel 8), 18×4 faces, 36×2 edges; all indices are 1-based and valid (1–24)

computeDynamics.detail: Implements planar dynamics per ADR: F_drive = sum(torques)/r, T_yaw = diff(torques)*w/(2r), dvel_x = F/m, domega_z = T/I, dpos = R*[vx;0;0], dq = 0.5*q*omega_Q

step_override.detail: Overrides Robot.step with real RK4 integration via DynamicsEngine.rk4Step, then calls obj.setState(s) (which calls updatePoseFromState). Handles empty Control gracefully.

plot_override.detail: Calls plot@robot.Robot to create hgtransform, then creates patch + line primitives from buildGeometry output

all_files_in_robot.detail: 6 files: Direction.m, DifferentialDrive.m, DynamicsEngine.m, Robot.m, Utils.m, Visualizer.m

internal_references_no_import.detail: No 'import robot.*' anywhere. DifferentialDrive uses robot.Robot, robot.Direction, robot.Utils.quatToRotmx, robot.Utils.quatMultiply. DynamicsEngine.rk4Step is bare (valid within-package reference).

import_robot_works.detail: All classdef files in +robot/ are properly defined; import robot.* resolves all six classes.

notes: ADR text for buildGeometry left wheel offset says (-trackWidth/2, 0, 0) but code uses (0, -trackWidth/2, 0). Code placement is physically correct (wheels on left/right sides); ADR text has a typo.
DifferentialDrive.step() adds empty-Control guard ([0;0] fallback) not in ADR spec — a safety improvement.
DifferentialDrive.step() uses obj.setState(s) instead of explicit State assignment + updatePoseFromState — functionally equivalent and cleaner.
